name: Beef Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds beef skirts or flank steak
1 16-oz bottle Kraft Zesty Italian Salad dressing
1 medium jar hot or medium Pace Picante sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the meat generously with salt, pepper, and Accent.
2. Remove seeds and membrane from bell peppers; slice into 1/4-inch wide slices from top to bottom.
3. Cut onions into 1/4-inch wide strips from top to bottom.
4. Place meat on a sheet of heavy tin foil with sides folded up to hold juices on a hot charcoal grill.
5. Brush the top side of the meat generously with Italian Salad dressing and cook for about 10 minutes, turning occasionally.
6. Turn and brush the bottom side of the meat with salad dressing; continue turning and dressing each side every 10 minutes until cooked to desired doneness (thickness of the meat determines cooking time).
7. After about 25-30 minutes of cooking, add sliced green bell peppers and onions to the meat juices on the foil.
8. Move the meat to an area away from direct coals and continue cooking as described above.
9. When the meat is done, slice it into thin slices (about 1/4-inch thick) and approximately 3 inches long.
10. To serve, heat flour tortillas individually on a hot iron skillet until softened, or in a damp kitchen towel in the microwave oven.
11. Arrange meat, bell pepper, onion, tomato cubes, guacamole, sour cream, and Picante sauce on each tortilla; roll up tightly around the filling.
12. Serve with tossed salad, refried beans, tortilla chips, margueritas, beer, etc. Serves 4-6.
